texto: If you accept that pets can love us as much as we do them, then the logic is clear and cannot be denied. If you believe that there is a heaven for people, then they must be there, waiting for us, when we cross over. Heaven is love, and pets always share that with us.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wallace Sife sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “If you accept that pets can love us as much as we do them, then the logic is clear and cannot be …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, loss, loss-of-pet, útil em momentos de luto e loss-of-pet.
